creator: matthias+freebsd+bugzilla@harz.de
text:
We updated 10-Stable to r303474 old revision was about end of may.
Afterwards we updated asterisk from 13.7.2 to 13.10.0

Everything seems to work, but since then every 8-16 hours
asterisk stops procession sip requestst.

Asterisk is running.
asterisk -r works
everything seems ok.

but netstat -f inet show  all sip port receive queses filling up.

only way to resolv: restart.
